title: Walking in the Spirit
speaker: Apostle Joyce Cofield
description: Learn how to walk daily in the power and guidance of the Holy Spirit.

title: The Power of Resurrection
speaker: Apostle Joyce Cofield
description: Understanding the resurrection power available to every believer.

title: Restoration Through the Word
speaker: Apostle Joyce Cofield
description: How God's Word brings complete restoration to broken lives.

title: Called to Intercede
speaker: Apostle Joyce Cofield
description: The importance and power of intercessory prayer in the life of a believer.
